payload.title: Event-log backup & disaster recovery
payload.description: Nightly off-host backup of the canonical append-only event log to S3/R2 with object versioning; treat the SQLite/replay cache as disposable (not backed up). Document and test the restore drill: pull the log, replay into a fresh cache, confirm the board matches. Coordinate the canonical-store decision with SCP-124. (From SCP-126.)
